---
title: Fir tour
description: |
  <br>A guided tour to [Canada's largest supercomputer](https://www.sfu.ca/research/institutes-centres-facilities/other-facilities/supercomputer-cedar.html). You will see the racks of interconnected computers, learn about our various hardware, as well as the cooling and powering systems.
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{.topdef}

**Date and time:** \
Tuesday, June 2, 2026, 8:30am-10:00am (note the earlier start than our usual time)

On Monday, we will have a sign-up sheet to register for one of the three tours: 8:30am-9:00am, 9:00am-9:30am,
or 9:30am-10:00am. Each tour group can accommodate a maximum of 10 people. If you are not here on Monday but
are planning to join one of the tours, please email the organizers, and we'll add your name to the list.

**Location:** \
We will be meeting at a parking lot in front of the [Water Tower
Building](https://maps.app.goo.gl/6qumYnS7imPtEEVv9) just before each tour, i.e. at 8:30am, 9:00am, and
9:30am. Please don't be late, as we can't let you in once the tour begins.

<!-- We will meet in front of SFU's Big Data Hub Presentation Studio (ASB 10900) and walk together to the -->
<!-- water tower. -->

**Guide:** \
Megan Meredith-Lobay

:::
